textByHash.4669eab7f351b04d2ad4a153f6e19231fcd81e45: Miss gnome to you, thank you.
textByHash.02c8bccca3ab32c4fedc6d7607996c21075d73b8: We are the companions of the leader of our expedition. We have come here to bargain for much needed supplies for our people.
textByHash.2ca4f39d7123c436fab3e541af1585dfbcc7fdae: Oh yes, sorry, that's what I meant to say.
